What is artificial intelligence?

Artificial Intelligence (AI) is the simulation of human intelligence processes by computer systems, including learning, reasoning, problem-solving, perception, and language understanding. AI can be categorized as narrow AI (designed for a specific task) or general AI (able to perform any intellectual task a human can).

What is the difference between Git and GitHub?

text: is GIT and GitHub

Git is a local command-line tool used for version control (tracking code history). GitHub is an online service that hosts Git repositories in the cloud and provides collaboration features. Git runs locally, whereas GitHub is web-based.
matched_question: What is the difference between Git and GitHub?
